title: TEC Prediction with GNSS–Aditya-L1 & LSTM
desc: LSTM-based TEC forecasting using GNSS and solar data.
details: Developed a full pipeline including STEC to VTEC conversion, feature engineering using solar data, and time-series modeling using LSTM networks.
